description_long: This is a two-story urban house with a rectangular footprint, clad in dark gray brickwork and featuring a flat roof. The front facade is symmetrical, with large rectangular windows and a central double-door entryway. The property includes a paved driveway bordered by manicured hedges, leading to a garage integrated into the house. The rear and side elevations have additional windows and a spacious balcony or terrace area, providing outdoor living space. The interior layout is visible from above, revealing multiple rooms and open-plan areas. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, two-story house with dark brick exterior, flat roof, large windows, and a driveway with garage. Features include a balcony, manicured hedges, and a symmetrical front entry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical windows, driveway, and garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage entrance, and side windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the balcony/terrace and additional windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the terrace and more of the upper floor layout.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double-door entry with steps, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
